_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

tests.assertion: payments and payment_events collections exist with required fields.
gross, commission and net payable are calculated from confirmed_student_count and fee config.
Payment link creation fails before student count finalisation.
Repeated create link call returns existing active payment, not duplicate.
Unsigned/invalid webhook does not update payment status.
Duplicate provider_event_id creates no duplicate side effects.
Amount mismatch sets under_review/mismatch, not paid.
Only finance_admin can manually confirm payment.
Manual payment confirmation fails without required evidence.
Reversal requires finance/system admin and allowed reason.
Reversed payment blocks exam slot and material release gates.
Exam slot booking blocked unless paid/manually_confirmed/reconciled.
Exam material release blocked unless paid/manually_confirmed/reconciled.
School coordinator sees only own payment summary.
Public role cannot read payments or payment_events.
Manual payment proof file is private and finance/admin-only.
SCHOOL_PAYMENT_RECON contains expected proof fields and mismatch conditions.
Every future payment bug fix adds regression tests.

acceptance_criteria: Payment link can be created after student count finalisation.
Webhook confirmation requires valid signature and idempotency.
Finance can manually confirm with evidence.
Payment gates block slots/materials until paid.
No public or cross-school payment data leakage.
